headline: Cleaned remaining public-facing internal language and kept utility pages quieter for launch QA.
focus: Remove residual build/implementation wording from public product surfaces without adding new features.
notes: Cleaned remaining Korean mixed-language/internal implementation phrases around release/expansion city layers.
Softened utility page language so release-check and whats-new do not read like public product copy.
Kept the first-run popup disabled and preserved the v198 mobile/dock cleanup.
